title: RUIHHLO CHU IN BAN PHAKAH AWM RENG MAH SE, HNAR NGAM ULA, TICHHIN SUH U.  RUIHHLO ZUAR RU KAN HRIAT CHUAN REPORT ZEL ANG U. AN PHU TAWK HREMNA HMU NGEI ZEL RAWH SE.  - Lalduhoma, Chief Minister.
content:
1176/2026-2027

Aizawl the 25th June 2026:Vawiin khan Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall-ah International Day against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking hman a ni a, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan khuallian niin a telpui a. Zirlai naupang kalkhawm leh a thusawi ngaithlatu zawng zawngte hnenah ruihhlo chu an ban phak maiah a lo awm reng a nih pawhin hnar ngam a, tichhin lo turin a chah a. "In nunna chhuhsak tur cheu a Setana thlemna hmanrua a ni. Mi tam takin an tichhin a, an inrin hman hmain a bawihah an lut a, an chhungkua a tichhe vek phawt a, thlanmualah a umlut zui thin", a ti.

Pi Lalrinpuii, Social Welfare Minister, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Excise Minister, Pu K. Laldawngliana, MLA bakah Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary leh official pawimawhte, zirlai naupangte an tel a, kalkhawmte hian ruihhlo laka fihlim tur leh do zel turin an intiam a ni.

Chief Minister thusawi tlangpuite chu:

1. Kum 2024 khan International Day against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking Day hi Vanapa Hall-ah ka hmanpui tawh che u a. Khatihlai vel khan Aizawl kawtthlerah leh district capital lamahte chenin ruihhlo ngai, Ngawlvei vak vel hmuh tur an la tam hle a. An video te pawh a viral thin a nih kha.

Sorkar, tlawmngaipawl leh kohhran hoten theihtawp kan han chhuah zui a. Supply lam ringawt danchah tum lovin, demand lam tihtawp pawh kan tum a. Security Coordination Committee kan din a, Ruihhlo Do Core Committee kan tinung thar a, Operation kan kalpui a. YMA ten kumpuanah Ruihhlo Do an puang a, Anti-Drugs Squad an kalpui a, chhun-zan zawmin hma an la a. Kohhran hrang hrangte thawhpuiah kan sawm a, kohhran huang chhunga lo sawi tam turin kan ngen a. Zirlai naupangte zingah awareness kan kalpui a, media campaign a kal reng bawk a.

Demand Reduction lamah Ngawlvei enkawlna hmun hrang hrangte kan thawhpui a, Hulhhliap Short Stay kan kalpui a. Kum 2024-a he ni kan hman tuma ka sawi ang khan - Sethawn Jordan Centre pawh Synod nen kan thawkho tawh a ni.

Hetianga sorkar, tlawmngaipawl leh kohhran hote pheikhai rual taka kan kal avang hian hma kan sawn hle a. Tunah chuan kan kawtthler velah Ngawlvei tei rawlai hmuh tur an lo tlem ta hle mai. Chhanchhuahna chang a, nunphung pangaia kir leh ta pawh tam tak kan nei tawh a ni.

2. Kan lo sawi tawh thin angin, kan chhak lawkah ruihhlo siamchhuahna ram an awm a, an rawn tawlhchhuahna hmatawngah kan lo awm si a. Do nasa viau mahila, tihrem vek hi a har thei. Chuvangin, ruihhlo hi kan ban phakah awm reng mah se, ti lo tura kan inven a, kan hnar ngam a ngai.

Mi thiamte sawi danin, ruihhlo laka himna tha ber chu tihchhin loh hi a ni a. Mi tam takin an tichhin a, “A ngawl ka vei zui chuang lo vang” ti reng chungin reiloteah a ngawl an vei zui mai thin. Vawiina lo kal khawm zirlai naupangte leh ka thusawi lo ngaithlatu zawng zawngte hnena ka ngenna chu - Ruihhlo chu i ban phakah awm reng mah se, tichhin suh - tih hi a ni. I nunna chhuhsak tur chea Setana thlemna hmanrua a ni. Mi tam takin an tichhin a, an inrin hman hmain a bawihah an lut a, an chhungkua a tichhe vek phawt a, thlanmualah a umlut zui thin.

3. Ruihhlo hmanga sumdawngtute hi mipuiten i enliam lo vang u. Midang nunna laksaktu, an chhungkua tichhe vek thei, an thlarau lam thlenga tihlum thei - ruihhlo zawrh chingte hi kan enliam mai mai tur a ni lo.

An chhungril chhiatzia hi a lo lang chhuak fo mai. Tun hnai mai pawh khan Mizo nula, Bangkok atanga rawn haw tur Suitcase-ah Heroine an man thu kan lo hria a. An thil zawrh kha mi nunna tichhetu a nih tawh hnuah, a ken kualna (trafficking) lamah midangte an la bum duh zel thin.

Mizote hi thil inthawn mai thin kan lo ni a, kan hmelhriat leh thian thate thil a nih phei chuan han hnarte hi kan lo hreh a. Harsa harsain kan kensak hram hram thin. Chutianga, Zo nun ze mawi kan lantirnate chu remchangah lain, chhungkaw bungraw pawimawh anga sawiin an ruihhlo chu midang an kentir ta a. Mi tha tak takin man an tawh phah a, Jail-ah te an lut a ni.

Mipuite hian ruihhlo zuar ru ka hria emaw rinhlelh kan nei a nih chuan thuneitute hnenah report zel ila, an phu tawk hremna hmu ngei rawh se.

4. Kumina kan Day thupui hi ‘Persisting Issues, New Challenges, Innovative Responses’ tih a ni a. Khawvelah Synthetic Drug te a lo chhuak a, a thehdarhtu lam Criminal group-te an pung a, Technology thar ber ber hmanga drug thehdarh thute a lo pung zel a. Ruihhlo kaihhnawih sualna thar a chhuak nasa a. Heng sualna thar lo chhuak zelte dolet thei tura kan intuaihriam zel hi a ngai.

Technology thar heng, drone kan tihte hmanga Drug Trafficking tite pawh kan lo nei ru reng tawh mai thei. Misualte hian min fin khalh ang a, kan hnung lam atangin min nuihsawh ang tihte hi a hlauhawm.

Demand reduction lama awareness kan kalpuina kawngah pawh tunlai mil takin, evidence base campaign kan uar a tulin ka hria.

Ruihhlo laka kan ram venhim te, ruihhlo bawiha tang lo tura thangtharte hnena zirtirte hi kan hna pawimawh, kan ram leh kan hnam humhimna hna a ni tih hre thar ila. Kan puanven te sawi chhingin, nasa zawka bei turin ke i pen ang u, tihte an ni.

Pi Lalrinpuii, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Minister te, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Excise & Narcotics Department te, Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary leh Pu R. Lalngheta, CYMA President te pawhin thu a sawi bawk.

He ni pual hian mi bik thlanchhuahte hnenah chawimawina hlan an ni a. Chung mite chu:

Category 1: Infiamna huang.

1. Cindy Remruatpuii Colney, Footballer2. Samuel Zadeng, Boxer

Category 2: Rahbi tleu enkawltu huang.

1. New Life Home Society Jeriko Khualbuk, rahbi tleu hmeichhiate enkawlna, mi 5000 an enkawl tawhtu.

Category 3: Ruihhlo sima, ngawlvei chhantu ni zuite huang:

1. Jimmy LNS Tluanga, kum 23 chhung ngawiveite chhanchhuah hna lo thawk tawh leh

2. B. Lalrinpuii, kum 7 zet ngawlveite tana thawktute an ni.

International Day against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking hi Social Welfare, Women & Child Development, DC Aizawl, Health & Family Welfare, Excise & Narcotics, I&PR, Higher & Technical, School Education, IG Prison, Assam Rifles, BSF, MRHG & CD, MSACS, CYMA, MKHC, HMIP, MDUF leh FINGODAP ten tangruala an buatsaih a ni a. A ni tak chu naktuk 26th June hi a ni nain sorkar chawlh ni (Holiday) a lo nih avangin vawiin hian hman a ni ta zawk a ni.

title: DR. LORRAIN LALPEKLIANA CHINZAH GRACES INTERNATIONAL DAY AGAINST DRUG ABUSE & ILLICIT TRAFFICKING PROGRAMME AS CHIEF GUEST IN LAWNGTLAI
content:
202/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 25 June 2026:As part of the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan under the ‘Viksit Bharat ki Pehchaan Programme’, the International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking was observed today at the DC Conference Hall, organised by the Deputy Commissioner’s Office. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, Adviser to the Chief Minister (H&FW, A&FW) and MLA of Lawngtlai East constituency, graced the occasion as the Chief Guest. The programme was chaired by Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

Addressing the gathering, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah conveyed his greetings and urged everyone to continue making dedicated efforts in the fight against drug abuse. He stated that drug misuse, illegal sale and trafficking have created serious problems across the world, and emphasised that Lawngtlai District must continue its efforts to combat and eliminate this menace. He stressed the need to adopt new approaches and strengthen awareness programmes on the harmful effects of drugs.

Highlighting the severe impact of drug abuse on individuals, society, the state and the nation, he called upon the people of Lawngtlai District to work together sincerely in the fight against drugs.

The Chief Guest stated that prevention is the first and most important step in combating drug abuse and that everyone must learn to protect themselves. He warned that even a single trial can lead to addiction and advised the youth to stay away from such substances. He especially encouraged students to focus on their studies and work hard to achieve success.

Speaking about the government’s anti-drug initiative ‘Operation Jericho’, he appreciated the efforts of the Deputy Commissioner’s Office, Police Department, NGOs, Village Councils, MJA and Churches in fighting drug abuse, and encouraged them to continue their efforts. He also appreciated those working for the rehabilitation and rescue of drug-affected persons and urged them not to lose hope.He further stated that every citizen has a role to play in stopping drug abuse and illegal drug trade, and called upon the gathering and the people of Lawngtlai to continue contributing their best efforts.

Presentations were delivered by DRS (CYLA), Gilead Drop-in Centre, Excise & Narcotics Department and Lairam Rescue Centre. Appreciation Certificates were also presented by the Chief Guest to SP, Excise & Narcotics Department, CYLA and MJA Lawngtlai in recognition of their outstanding work in combating drug abuse.A pledge-taking ceremony marking the International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking was conducted led Shri Zonunchama Ralte, DIPRO.

During the programme, Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga delivered the welcome adress and representatives from government departments, NGOs, MJA and students attended the event. Smt Malsawmtluangi, Superintendent, DC Office, delivered the concluding remarks.

The International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking is observed every year on 26 June worldwide with a specific theme. Since the government holiday falls this year, the observance was held on 25 June. The theme for 2026 is:“Foresight and innovation in action: forging solutions for the world drug problem.”

Attachment

title: DR. LORRAIN LALPEKLIANA CHINZAH HOVIN LAWNGTLAIAH INTERNATIONAL DAY AGAINST DRUG ABUSE & ILLICIT TRAFFICKING HMANG
content:
1175/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 25th June 2026:Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan - hnuaia 'Viksit Bharat ki Pehchaan Programme' kalpui mekah vawiin khan Deputy Commissioner Office buatsaihin 'International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking' chu DC Conference Hall-ah hman a ni a. He hunah hian Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah Adviser to Chief Minister ( H&FW, A& FW) leh Lawngtlai East bialtu MLA nibawk chuan khuallian niin a hmanpuia, bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hun a kaihruai.

Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan kalkhawmte chibai bukna neiin, Ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a sawm a. Ruihhlo hmansual, dan lova zuar leh tawlhrukin khawvel a tibuai nasa hle tih tarlangin, hetiang karah hian Lawngtlai District - pawhin theihtawp chhuah do leh umbo tura hmalak chhunzawm zel a pawimawh hle a ti a. A bik takin ruihhlo thatlohzia inzirtirna kawngah rahbi thar kaia, uar zawka kalpui a tul hle a ti. Ruihhloin mimal, Khawtlang, ram leh hnam tan harsatna leh buaina a thlen nasa dan ngaihtuahin, tih takzeta do tlan a tul hle tiin, Lawngtlai District- mipuite a do kawngah thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

Khuallian chuan Ruihhlo Do kawngah Ruihhlo laka inven chu tihmakmawh hmasa a ni tih sawiin, mahni theuh inven thiam a tul hle a ti a. Vawikhat tihchhinin ngawlveina a thlen thei tih hriaa, thalaite chu tichhin lo turin a chah a. A bik takin zirlaite chu an ziarlai chauh ngaipawimawha, hlawhtlinna chang tura theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a. Ruihhlo do kawnga sawrkarin 'Operation Jericho' a kalpui mekah, Bawrhsap Office ,Police, NGO, VC, MJA leh Kohhran ten theihtawp an chhuah thin chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin, hmalam pan zel turin a chah a. Ruihhlo bawia tang mekte chhanchhuah kawnga thawktute chhuanawm a tih thu tarlangin, beidawng lo a thawk zel turin a fuih a. Ruihhlo hmansual leh dan lova sumdawnna tirem turin mitinin tangkaina an nei tih sawiin, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan theihtawp chhuah zel turin kalkhawmte leh Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

DRS (CYLA),Gilead Drop- in Center, Excise & Narcotics Department leh Lairam Rescue Center- te atangin 'presentation' ngaihthlak niin, Ruihhlo do kawngah thawk thate- SP Excise & Narcotics Department, CYLA leh MJA Lawngtlai hnenah 'Aprreciation Certificate ' hlanna neih nghal niin Khuallian Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan a hlan a ni. International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking - pual hian thu intiamkamna neih a ni a, Pu Zonunchama Ralte, (DIPRO) chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Lawngtlai bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Sawrkar Department, NGOs,MJA, leh Zirlaite an tel thei a, Pi Malsawmtluangi, Superintendent, DC Office, chuan lawmthu sawiin huna a khar.

International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking- hi kum tinin June ni 26 - ah khawvel pumah thupui thlan bik neiin  hman thin a ni a. Kumin bikah chuan sawrkar chawlh a nih avangin ni 25, June ah hman niin,  thupui atan hian “Foresight and innovation in action: forging solutions for the world drug problem” thlan  a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District chhunga ruihhlo man cheng nuai 48, 41,400/- man halral
content:
1174/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 25th of June, 2026:  Vawiin khan Mamit District Drug Disposal Committee hmalaknain District Hospital incinerator-ah Mamit District chhunga damdawi leh ruihhlo man hrang hrangte halralna hun hman a ni a, Pu Suvigya S Chandra, IAS District Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo halralna hun hi a hmanpui.

District Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo man tawh sa hetiang zat hal ral tur a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawia, ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih hian kan ram mai bakah Mamit District chhungah pawh chhungkaw tam tak min tibuaia, ruihhlo do tur hian tihtak zeta hma kan lak a tula, a man chhuah kawngah Police te tha tichaktu nia thawhpui atan khawtlang hruaitu leh tlawmngai pawlte chu a sawm a ni.

Vawiina ruihhlo halral te hi Mamit PS leh West Phaileng PS atanga man Heroin 118.08 grams leh Meth 1.89 kg te niin local market a chhutin Rs. 48,41,400/- (nuai sawmli pariat singli sangkhat zali) man hu a ni. Ruihhlo man khawm halral tur hi Mamit District Drug Disposal Committee te chuan uluk taka an endik hnuah leh man a nih laia a zat nen a in mil em tihte endik a nih hnuah halral tura ruahman a ni.

Vawiin ruihhlo halralna hunah hian Pi C. Lalbiaksiami, Addl SP, Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, SDO (S), Dr. Lalrinfela H, Medical Superintendent te bakah tlawmngaipawl aiawhte leh khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Central Agricultural University Successfully Concludes Three-Day Joint Council Meetings
content:
201/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 25th June 2026:The Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal, successfully organised three important Joint Council Meetings from 22 to 24 June 2026 at the College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry, CAU, Selesih. The meetings were the 15th Research Council Meeting (RCM), the 11th Extension Education Council Meeting (EECM), and the 33rd Academic Council Meeting (ACM).

The inaugural session of these three key meetings, held on 22 June, 2026, was graced by the Governor of Mizoram, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), who attended as the Chief Guest. Following the inauguration, the Director of Research, Director of Extension Education and Director of Instruction of CAU Imphal presented comprehensive reports on the University’s achievements and future plans.

During the 15th Research Council Meeting, research teams from various faculties under CAU presented the major achievements and challenges of their ongoing research projects. Research Team Leaders from the disciplines of Agriculture, Horticulture, Fishery, Forestry, and Animal & Veterinary Sciences shared valuable insights and proposed strategies for future advancements.

The 11th Extension Education Council Meeting focused on topics such as the promotion of Chemical Free Villages, progress in extension activities and various future initiatives aimed at strengthening outreach programmes.

The 33rd Academic Council Meeting deliberated on important academic matters, including curriculum revision, updates to academic regulations and measures to further enhance the quality of agricultural education.

On the concluding day, 24 June 2026, Deans from all 13 constituent colleges of CAU Imphal presented detailed reports on the progress and achievements of their respective colleges.

The valedictory meeting was chaired by Dr. Anupam Mishra, Vice-Chancellor of CAU. Valuable inputs and suggestions were received from external experts and special invitees who attended the Joint Council Meetings.

More than 100 experts and faculty members from the 13 constituent colleges participated in the CAU Joint Council Meetings. The participants engaged in productive and in-depth discussions on several key issues vital to the continued growth and development of the University.

Attachment

title: Ni 3 awh Central Agricultural University Joint Council Meeting tluang taka neih a ni
content:
1173/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 25th June, 2026:June ni 22-24, 2026 chhung khan College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry, CAU, Selesih-ah Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal, Joint Council Meeting eeting pawimawh tak tak pathum- 15th Research Council Meeting (RCM), 11th Extension Education Council Meeting (EECM) leh 33rd Academic Council Meeting (ACM) te tluang taka neih a ni.

Heng meeting pawimawh pathumte hawnna hun June ni 22, 2026 a neih chu Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Hemi hnu hian CAU Imphal Director of Research, Director of Extension Education leh Director of Instruction-te ruahmannain University hmalakna leh hmabakte sawi hona hun neih zui a ni.

15th Research Council Meeting-ah hian Central Agricultural University hnuaia zirna peng hrang hrangte atangin zirbingna (research) an neih tawh atanga hlawhtlinna an hmuh leh hmachhawpte tarlan a ni a. Agriculture, Horticulture, Fishery, Forestry, Animal & Veterinary Science atanga Research Team Leader atana ruat mi hrang hrang ten hun hmangin hmasawnna tur ni a hriatte sawi hona hun hman zui a ni.

Extension Education Council Meeting vawi 11-na ah hian Chemical Free Village chungchangte, extension activites lama hmasawnnate leh hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni a. Academic Council Meeting, vawi 33-na ah hian curriculum siamthat chungchangte, academic regulation leh agricultural education quality tihhmasawnna turte sawi ho a ni bawk.

Meeting tawp ni nimin June ni 24, 2026 khan Central Agricultural University (CAU) Imphal hnuaia college hrang hrang 13-a Dean-te atangin an enkawl college theuha hma an lak dante leh hlawhtlinna an neihte ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Meeting kharna hi nizan khan Dr. Anupam Mishra, Vice-Chancellor, CAU kaihhruaia neih niin, Joint Council Meeting atana sawm external expert leh special invitee-te hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni.

CAU Joint Council Meeting-ah hian Constituent College hrang hrang 13 atangin mithiam 100 chuang an tel a. Central Agricultural University hmasawn zelna tur thil pawimawh hrang hrang zir hona leh sawi hona hun hlawkthlak tak an hmang a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District-ah Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan Pualin Zirlai Naupangten Ruihhlo leh Ruihhlo Tawlhruk Dona Kawngzawh – Grand Rally an nei
content:
1172/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 25th June, 2026:Vawiin dar 09:15 a.m. khan Hnahthial zirlai naupangte leh zirtirtute chuan Ruihhlo leh Ruihhlo Tawlhruk Dona Kawngzawh – Grand Rally chu Hnahthial khawchhung hmun hnih – Nauhruaikawn leh Electric Veng Volleyball Court atanga neiin Bazar Shed kawtah inhmukhawmin programme hman nghal a ni a. Hnahthial District NMBA Committee Chairman leh Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K.Vanlalruati chuan he hun puala thusawina hun hmangin Pu Joseph Zokunga, Dy. District Project Coordinator, Samagra Shiksha, Hnahthial chuan hun a kaihruai a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan chungchang sawi zauna neiin NMBA bitum ber chu thalaite, hmeichhiate, naupangte, zirna in hrang hrang a zirlaite, tlawmngai pawlte leh khawtlang mipuite an nih thu a sawi a. Tun hma chuan ruihhlo do turin pawl tlem te chauh an thawh chhuah thin thu sawiin tunah chuan khawtlang mipuiten tangrualin ruihhlo kan do ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu ruihhlo dona kalkawnga awm kan nih avangin mipuite, kohhran leh sawrkar chu tanrual a tul thu sawiin ruihhlo do nana sawrkar hmalak hrang hrangte a tarlang nghal a ni.

Damdawi hmansual pawina te tarlangin zirlaite chu ti ve chhin ngai lo turin a chah a, damdawi hriatchian loh chu lo ei ve tawp lo tura chahin damdawi tha lo leh damdawi hman sual lakah inthiarfihlim zel turin zirlaite chu a chah bawk a ni.

Pu H. Hmingthanzuala, Master Trainer, NMBA chuan zirlaite tan ruihhlo that lohna leh tichhin pawizia zirtirna hun a hmang a, hemi zawh hian Ruihhlo laka fihlim tura intiamna - NMBA Pledge chu lak niin pledge lakna hi programme chairman, Pu Joseph Zokunga chuan a kaihruai a ni.

NMBA puala Drawing Competition, Middle leh High & Higher Secondary School te tana buatsaih lawmman semna hun hman nghal niin Pu F.Lalrinfela, DIPRO chuan semna hun hi a kaihruai a. Lawmman dawngtute chu:

Middle school Category:

1. C Lalruatsangi, Class VIII, Presbyterian English School

2. Remruatfeli, Class VIII, Presbyterian English School

3. Lalrinsangi, Class VIII, Nuchhungi English Medium School

Consolation Prize:

Esther Lalremruati, Class VIII, St. Stephen High School

Christy Lalmawikimi, Class VII, Govt. Middle School

High & Higher Secondary School Category :

1. C Hmingthanpuii, Class XI,  FD Higher Secondary School

2. F. Lalhriatsanga, Class XI, Moriah Public School

3. H lalhriatpuii, Class X, St Stephen High school

Consolation Prize:

C. Lalhriatsaki, Class X, Moriah Public School

Lalruattluangi, Class IX, Govt. Southern High school

An vai hian Citation dawngin Pakhatna hian Rs 3000 a dawng a, pahnihna in Rs 2000 dawngin pathumna hian Rs 1000 a dawng a ni .Consolation prize hian Rs. 500 leh citation a keng tel bawk.

He Grand Rally-ah hian School sawm leh pathum (13) atangin zirlai zali sawmkua leh pali (494) leh zirtirtu  sawmhnih leh paruk (26) ten kawng an zawh a ni.

Attachment

title: BSF in football tournament buatsaih
content:
1171/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl,25th June, 2026:Border Security Force (BSF)-te chuan 'Spandan District Level Sub-Junior Football Tournament' chu June ni 10,2026 atanga ni 23, 2026 chhung khan Tlabung-ah leh Barapansuri khua, Lunglei leh Lawngtlai district-ah te an buatsaih a, tluang taka neih zawh a ni.

Inelnaah (Tournament)-ah hian huang (category) hnih mipa leh hmeichhia awmin, hmeichhe huang (Girls’ category)-ah hian team riat telin, Baransapuri village stadium-ah June 10 atanga june 13 chhungin khelh niin, Baransapuri -II team chu pakhatna an ni a. Mipa huang (Boys’ category)-ah hian team sawmpakhat telin, June 17 atanga June 23 chhung khan Tlabung Village Stadium-ah khelh niin, Zodin SC-B team chu pakhatna an ni thung a ni.

Inelna hi BSF-te hmalakna pawimawh tak niin, a tum chu ramri depa awm thalaite’n infiamna huangah hmasawnna leh hlawhtlinna an hmuhtheihna tura hun tha siam sak leh khawtlangah inlungrualna leh inpawhna thuk zawk a awm theihna tura buatsaih thin a ni. Inelna neih zawh takah hian tualchhung thalai thahnem tak telin, he hmalakna in a tum ramri depa awm thalaite infiamna kaltlanga inelna thianghlim zirtir leh khawtlang nuna hruailuh chu a hlawhtling hle a ni.

Inelna kharna inkhawmah hian BSF hotute leh a chhehvel khua atanga Village Council President (VCP)-te’n an telpui a, Inelna tluang taka neih a nih theihna tura tha leh zung sengtute chungah hotute chuan lawmthu an sawi a. Chakna changtu team-te leh mimal chetha te hnenah chawimawina hlan a ni.
